ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student athlete */,
  "student_label" INTEGER /* Label assigned to the student for internal tracking */,
  "coast" TEXT /* Coast where the student is located (e.g., east coast, west coast) */,
  "university_year" TEXT /* Current academic year of the student (e.g., frosh, sophomore, junior, senior) */,
  "early_bird_night_owl" TEXT /* Circadian rhythm of the student (e.g., early bird, night owl) */,
  "previous_competitive_sports" TEXT /* Previous competitive sports the student has participated in */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major of the student */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the student */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* Injury history of the student */,
  "allergy_info" TEXT /* Allergy information of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete who played the game */,
  "game_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student in the game */,
  "game_scheduled" TEXT /* Time the game was scheduled (e.g., noon, evening) */,
  "hours_sleep_night_before_game" INTEGER /* Number of hours of sleep the student had the night before the game */,
  "meals_on_day_prior_to_game" INTEGER /* Number of meals the student had on the day prior to the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Opponent in the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete who attended the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "percent_attendance" REAL /* Percentage of training sessions attended by the student */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session (e.g., strength, conditioning) */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach who led the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_scores" (
  "fitness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete */,
  "fitness_score" REAL /* Overall fitness score of the student */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date when the fitness score was assessed */,
  "score_category" TEXT /* Category of the fitness score (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_sessions" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy session */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete who attended the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the strategy session */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of extra strategy sessions attended by the student */,
  "session_topic" TEXT /* Topic of the strategy session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_sessions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sleep_patterns" (
  "sleep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sleep pattern entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete */,
  "sleep_date" TEXT /* Date of the sleep pattern entry */,
  "hours_slept" INTEGER /* Number of hours slept by the student */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep (e.g., good, poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sleep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sleep_patterns_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meal_logs" (
  "meal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meal log entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete */,
  "meal_date" TEXT /* Date of the meal log entry */,
  "meal_count" INTEGER /* Number of meals consumed by the student */,
  "meal_type" TEXT /* Type of meal (e.g., breakfast, lunch, dinner) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meal_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., athletic department, academics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Specific data viewed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport coached by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sport */,
  "sport_name" TEXT /* Name of the sport */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season of the sport (e.g., fall, spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_sports" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student athlete */,
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sport */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the student's participation in the sport */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the student's participation in the sport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id", "sport_id")
)
